sentences.text: Nowadays, every good storyteller starts with the end, continues with the beginning, and finishes with the middle.
This is the new way of telling stories.
I learned about it recently from a critic who was walking around the pond with a young man.
The critic talked a lot about it, and I think he was right because he wore blue glasses and was bald, and he always said 'Pooh!' to the young man's comments.
